title: Digital Horizon: Information-Theoretic Capacity Saturation at the Hubble Boundary
summary: Derives the cosmological constant Λ from information-theoretic capacity saturation at the Hubble horizon, yielding a universal saturation fraction f_1 = ln(2).
relevance: Convergent with MSQECC Version VIII holographic boundary conditions. Confirms the code space limit.

title: Extended Proton Decay Limits from Super-Kamiokande
summary: New data extends the lower bound on proton lifetime, finding no evidence of decay across major channels.
relevance: Validates the strict ΔE=0 macroscopic energy conservation enforced by the MSQECC structure. Macroscopic matter remains stable.

title: SPARC: Mass Models for 175 Disk Galaxies with Spitzer Photometry and Accurate Rotation Curves
authors: Federico Lelli, Stacy S. McGaugh, James M. Schombert
summary: Presents models for 175 nearby galaxies, establishing a tight radial acceleration relation (RAR).
relevance: The foundational dataset on which the MSQECC constant k ≈ 9.575 was verified with R² = 0.82.
